LanguageData.Playwright.Settings.EnablePlaywrightButt: Enable Playwright button in main menu
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Intro.Welcome:
Welcome to Playwright!
Use the tabs on the left to start composing your scenario.
When you're done, click "Save Scenario" to save your Playwright as a new scenario.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.SuggestedIdeo.Help: You are not required to pick the suggested Ideoligion. Go wild!
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Origin.Welcome: Choose an Origin. This will determine who you are, and why you are here.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Crashlande: Survivors who crashlanded onto the planet. The default experience.
- Choose 3 colonists (out of 8) - Start with a rifle, handgun and a knife. - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like steel and wood is scattered around the map.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Tribal.Des: The remnants of a destroyed tribe. The default tribal experience.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Tribal.Sum: - Choose 5 colonists (out of 11) - Start with a club and a bow. - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like wood is scattered around the map.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.RichExplor: A Rich Explorer looking to start anew. The default Rich Explorer experience.
- Choose 1 colonist (out of 8) - Start with a handgun and a knife. - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like steel and wood is scattered around the map.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Empire.Des: 5 Imperial Novices sent down to lay down the foundation for colonization of the planet.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Empire.Sum: - Choose 5 colonists (out of 10) - Every colonist starts with a Novice title with the Empire. - Every colonist starts with a Level 1 Psylink. - You are Allied with the Empire by default. - You are Enemies with Deserters by default (VFE Deserters only). - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like steel and wood is scattered around the map.
LanguageData.Playwright.Tabs.Boons.Welcome: Choose your Boons. This will determine extra stuff you start out with (if any).
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Boons.Shuttle.Desc: Start with a pre-built Passenger Shuttle from Odyssey.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Esca: Escape the planet by any means. This could be a ship you build yourself, or you can procure a way out from the locals. You win when at least 1 colonist escapes the planet. The default experience.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Arch: Awaken the Archonexus Core by acquiring all 3 map pieces and then awakening the core. You win when the Archonexus Core is awakened. The default Ideology experience.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Mono: Work your way up into Metal Hell, and choose to embrace the void or sever its connection with the world. The default Anomaly experience.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Conq: Ally with or destroy every possible faction on the planet. Factions without bases (such as Mechanoids or Insectoids) are not counted. You win when the only remaining settlements on the map are owned by either you, or an allied faction.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Colo: Have a certain number of colonists. Temporary colonists (from quests or otherwise) are not counted. You win when your permanent colonist count equals or exceeds the goal. (Mind the potential lag when setting the goal)
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Roya: Have a certain number of colonists with the chosen Royal Title. Temporary colonists (from quests or otherwise) are not counted. You win when the amount of permanent colonists with the specified title equals or exceeds the goal.
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenParts.StartWithHonor.Help:
Each starting colonist will start with a specified amount of Honor with the Empire.
"Apply Titles" will automatically consume Honor to bestow the proper titles. If disabled, the bestowing ceremonies still have to happen.
Required starting Honor for titles: Freeholder: 1 Novice: 7 Acolyte: 13 Knight/Dame: 21 Praetor: 31 Baron/Baroness: 45 Archon: 65
Honor and Titles are awarded after the game begins. They will not be visible in the preparation screen.
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenParts.StartWithHonor.Summ: Start with {0} Honor with {1} (with bestowed titles)
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenParts.FactionNaturalGoodw:
Change a faction's natural goodwill to a specified amount.
This affects the starting goodwill, and what value they will trend towards if left alone.
Ally: 75 or higher Neutral: Between -74 and 74 (inclusive) Hostile: -75 or lower
LanguageData.Playwright.ScenParts.FactionForcedGoodwi:
Permanently forces a faction's goodwill to a specified amount.
This affects the starting goodwill and their current goodwill, forever. They cannot be swayed, no matter what happens.
Ally: 75 or higher Neutral: Between -74 and 74 (inclusive) Hostile: -75 or lower
